## Installation

### macOS

1. Download the `.dmg` and drag **md-pdf** into `/Applications`.
2. The first time you open it, macOS will refuse with _"md-pdf is damaged…"_ — this app is ad-hoc signed only. Remove the quarantine flag once:
   ```bash
   xattr -dr com.apple.quarantine /Applications/md-pdf.app
   ```
3. Open it normally afterwards. Updates downloaded inside the app don't need this step.

### Windows

Download the `.exe`, run it. SmartScreen may warn — choose _More info → Run anyway_.
